philosophy: Top-down regime mapping. Expresses directional, largely unhedged convictions via global liquidity metrics, sovereign yield curves, and central bank reaction functions. Follows Ray Dalio's 'Economic Machine' framework — every market event is a manifestation of causal debt cycles.

institutional_secrets.causality_engine: Rejects 'Correlation' in favor of 'Causal Drivers' (3 Levers: Productivity, Short-term Debt, Long-term Debt).
institutional_secrets.segmentation: Pure Alpha (Active directional bets) vs All Weather (Risk Parity beta).
institutional_secrets.regime_conviction: Stagflationary bias — models focus on 'Real Yield' vs 'Nominal Growth' divergence.

leverage_estimate: 80% Gross (High Notional via Derivatives and Futures)

factor_exposure.duration: Extreme — rates drive all macro equity pricing
factor_exposure.currency: High — FX is a primary expression vehicle
factor_exposure.commodity: Moderate — used as regime confirmation signal
factor_exposure.inflation_linkage: Very High — CPI, PCE, breakevens are primary inputs

sector_concentration: None — trades broad indices, sovereign curves, and FX pairs

risk_constraints.forced_liquidation_trigger: Unexpected Central Bank pivot OR thesis invalidation event

preferred_instruments: Sovereign Bonds and Bond Futures (TLT, ZB)

historical_regime_behavior.q4_2018_rate_hike: Aggressively shorted front-end rates via Eurodollar futures. Avoided equity fundamentals. Amplified duration shock.
historical_regime_behavior.march_2020_covid: Massive long duration structural trades (long TLT) as fiscal response predicted rate suppression.
historical_regime_behavior.q3_2022_inflation: Correctly identified 'Stagflationary' regime; Pure Alpha gained 32% in H1 2022 via short bonds/long USD.

macro_reaction_function: Unhedged conviction amplification. During a duration shock, aggressively shorts bond proxies and long-duration tech ETFs — compounds catalyst directionally rather than hedging.

fidelity_score.match_breakdown: High cohesion with Ray Dalio's 'Economic Machine' (Causal Logic). The agent's 2022 performance (identifying stagflation early) mirrors actual Bridgewater results. Observability is high due to public investor letters and the thematic nature of their trades being visible in larger G10 bond/FX flows.

projected_30d_portfolio.logic: Direct expression of Bond Vigilante duration shock; riding the Bear Steepener.
Yield-differential play as Fed remains hawkish vs global peers.
Opportunistic hedge reduction as real yields spike.
